R3.question:
User: I saw a great movie last week.

User: Breaking In (2018) with Gabrielle Union. It was a lot like Panic Room (2002) with Jodie Foster

System:
R3.answer: Hush (2016), Mother! (2017), Memento (2000), Identity (2003), Red Sparrow (2018)
